blockers.message: future runtime activation still requires a separate human authorization

sections.summary: Fourteen read-only operator scenarios passed, including no-pattern handling, repeated failure mining, budget failure, reference failure, output boundary, replay, retention, concurrency, and runtime-influence checks.
sections.title: Evaluation Decision

sections.summary: No network calls, Git writes, pull requests, approvals, source mutation, deployment, runtime promotion, provider calls, connector calls, model training, v0.2 tag, or release were created by the evaluation.
sections.title: Runtime Hold

summary: AION-179 records a PASS recommendation for a future controlled activation authorization review while keeping shadow mode operator-invoked, read-only, advisory, and runtime-disabled.
title: Self-Improvement Shadow Mode
